creator: editor@callfortesting.org
text:
The VM will reboot shortly after the loader splash screen on a 14.0-RELEASE-p6 host:

Loading kernel...
/boot/kernel/kernel text=0x17ac20 text=0xd6b360 text=0x4236d4 data=0x180 data=0x186448+0x478bb8 0x8+0x188838+0x8+0x1abd4a\
Loading configured modules...
/etc/hostid size=0x25
/boot/kernel/zfs.ko size 0x5d51c8 at 0x1f35000
/boot/entropy size=0x1000
+ bhyve_exit=0

Beats a panic.
